glosses.ro: a pune la loc; a da înapoi

sentences.target: Je remets le lait au frigo.

translations.fr: Je remets le lait au frigo.
translations.en: I'm putting the milk back in the fridge.
translations.es: Vuelvo a meter la leche en la nevera.
translations.de: Ich stelle die Milch wieder in den Kühlschrank.
translations.ru: Я ставлю молоко обратно в холодильник.
translations.pt: Eu coloco o leite de volta na geladeira.
translations.vi: Tôi để sữa lại vào tủ lạnh.
translations.nl: Ik zet de melk terug in de koelkast.
translations.uk: Я ставлю молоко назад в холодильник.
translations.hi: मैं दूध वापस फ्रिज में रख रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Wkładam mleko z powrotem do lodówki.
translations.nb: Jeg setter melken tilbake i kjøleskapet.
translations.id: Saya menaruh susu kembali ke dalam kulkas.
translations.sv: Jag ställer tillbaka mjölken i kylen.
translations.da: Jeg sætter mælken tilbage i køleskabet.
translations.ja: 牛乳を冷蔵庫に戻します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; the doer of the action.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses the action of putting back.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'lait'.
Common noun; direct object of 'remets' (what is being put back).
Preposition as a fused form (à + le); introduces the locative complement indicating destination/location.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the place.

sentences.target: Tu peux remettre ce livre à Léa.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ʁəmɛtʁ sə livʁ a le.a/

translations.fr: Tu peux remettre ce livre à Léa.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ʁəmɛtʁ sə livʁ a le.a/
translations.en: You can give this book back to Léa.
translations.es: Puedes devolver este libro a Léa.
translations.de: Du kannst Léa dieses Buch zurückgeben.
translations.it: Puoi ridare questo libro a Léa.
translations.ko: 이 책을 레아에게 다시 줄 수 있어요.
translations.yue: 你可以將呢本書交返畀Léa。
translations.ru: Ты можешь вернуть эту книгу Лее.
translations.pt: Você pode devolver este livro para a Léa.
translations.he: אתה יכול להחזיר את הספר הזה לליאה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể trả lại cuốn sách này cho Léa.
translations.ar: يمكنك إعادة هذا الكتاب إلى ليا.
translations.nl: Je kunt dit boek teruggeven aan Léa.
translations.uk: Ти можеш повернути цю книгу Леї.
translations.hi: तुम यह किताब लेआ को वापस दे सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να δώσεις πίσω αυτό το βιβλίο στη Léa.
translations.nb: Du kan gi denne boken tilbake til Léa.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengembalikan buku ini kepada Léa.
translations.sv: Du kan lämna tillbaka den här boken till Léa.
translations.ro: Poți să dai înapoi această carte lui Léa.
translations.da: Du kan give denne bog tilbage til Léa.
translations.fi: Voit antaa tämän kirjan takaisin Lealle.
translations.ja: この本をレアに返せます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; the agent of the action.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'remettre'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal auxiliary 'peux'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'livre'.
Common noun; direct object of 'remettre'.
Preposition; introduces the indirect object (recipient).
Proper noun; indirect object/recipient introduced by 'à'.

sentences.target: Il remet son badge à l'accueil.

translations.fr: Il remet son badge à l'accueil.
translations.en: He hands in his badge at reception.
translations.de: Er gibt seinen Ausweis an der Rezeption ab.
translations.it: Consegna il suo badge alla reception.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在前台上交他的工牌。
translations.yue: 佢喺前台交返自己嘅工牌。
translations.ru: Он сдаёт свой пропуск на ресепшене.
translations.pt: Ele entrega seu crachá na recepção.
translations.he: הוא מוסר את התג שלו בקבלה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy nộp thẻ của mình ở quầy lễ tân.
translations.nl: Hij levert zijn pasje in bij de receptie.
translations.uk: Він здає свій бейдж на ресепшені.
translations.hi: वह रिसेप्शन पर अपना बैज जमा करता है.
translations.el: Παραδίδει το πάσο του στη ρεσεψιόν.
translations.nb: Han leverer inn ID-kortet sitt i resepsjonen.
translations.id: Dia menyerahkan tanda pengenalnya di meja resepsionis.
translations.sv: Han lämnar in sitt passerkort i receptionen.
translations.da: Han afleverer sit adgangskort i receptionen.
translations.ja: 彼は受付でバッジを返却します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; the actor of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; denotes the action.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'badge'.
Common noun; direct object of 'remet'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating destination/place.
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun; determiner for 'accueil'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à' (the reception/front desk).

sentences.target: Nous remettons les chaises en place.

translations.fr: Nous remettons les chaises en place.
translations.en: We're putting the chairs back in place.
translations.es: Volvemos a colocar las sillas en su sitio.
translations.de: Wir stellen die Stühle wieder an ihren Platz.
translations.ko: 우리는 의자를 제자리로 다시 놓고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我哋將啲櫈放返去原位。
translations.ru: Мы ставим стулья обратно на места.
translations.pt: Estamos colocando as cadeiras de volta no lugar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đặt ghế lại vào đúng chỗ.
translations.nl: We zetten de stoelen weer op hun plek.
translations.uk: Ми ставимо стільці назад на місця.
translations.hi: हम कुर्सियों को उनकी जगह पर वापस रख रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Ustawiamy krzesła z powrotem na swoje miejsca.
translations.el: Βάζουμε ξανά τις καρέκλες στη θέση τους.
translations.nb: Vi setter stolene tilbake på plass.
translations.id: Kami menaruh kursi kembali ke tempat semula.
translations.sv: Vi ställer tillbaka stolarna på plats.
translations.cs: Dáváme židle zpátky na svá místa.
translations.da: Vi sætter stolene tilbage på plads.
translations.ja: 椅子を元の場所に戻しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; describes the action performed by the subject.
Definite article, plural; determiner for 'chaises'.
Common noun; direct object of 'remettons'.
Preposition; part of the fixed expression 'en place' indicating final arrangement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en' forming the idiomatic locution 'en place'.
